testcase.name: testContainsPositive

failure.message: Cheese is cheese, Should return 'true' for contains cheese expected:<true> but was:<false>

testcase.name: testIncrementAndGet

testcase.name: testContainsNegative
testcase.system-out: chess chess + c. + null reached -- chess + c + null hess + h. + null reached -- hess + h + null ess + e. + null reached -- ess + e + null ss + s. + null reached -- ss + s + null s + s. + null reached -- s + s + null incremented chess
